title: USIF PAR Sheet Schema v1.0
description: Universal Slot Interchange Format — PAR Sheet open standard. Two tiers of fields: REQUIRED (regulator submission baseline) and OPTIONAL (Tier-1 math-director extra credit). The optional fields are what slot vendors keep secret; this schema publishes them as a public standard. References: GLI-19 §3, UKGC RTS-7, MGA PPD §11.f, eCOGRA Generic Slots Algorithm Audit, Harrigan & Dixon (CDS Press 2014).

schemaVersion.description: Pinned. Future revisions bump to 1.1 / 2.0 with explicit migration notes.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of report generation.

configHash.description: SHA-256 (or truncated 16-char) of the source IR config. Allows lab-side cryptographic match between the audited config and the deployed binary.

paySystem.description: Both kebab-case (USIF canonical) and snake_case (vendor-legacy) forms accepted. Validators may normalize to canonical kebab-case on read.

targetRTP.description: Target RTP. Values >1 are interpreted as percent (e.g. 96 = 96%); values ≤1 as fraction (e.g. 0.96 = 96%).

maxWin.description: Max-win cap as multiple of bet (UKGC SI 2025/215, NL KSA, MGA PPD).

paytableScaleFactor.description: Optional auto-scale factor applied to match targetRTP.

rngBackend.description: Optional. Required for FIPS / GLI-19 RNG-source attestation.

rtpBreakdown.description: Segment RTP by feature class. Tier-1 math directors require this — regulators don't always.

volatility.description: OPTIONAL. Standard fields are VI95 / VI99; extra-credit adds full quantile vector and POT (Peaks-Over-Threshold) Pareto fit for max-win-tail projection.

p9999.description: P99.99 tail — auditor extra extra credit.

paretoTail.description: EVT POT fit — projects max-win-cap pressure beyond observed sample.

features.description: Per-feature contribution + frequency. REQUIRED if game has any feature (FS / H&W / cascade / wheel / pick / buy / ante / gamble / symbol-upgrade).

transitionMatrix.description: OPTIONAL Tier-1 extra credit. For Markov-modelable features (collection bonus, sticky wilds, Lightning-Link-class), publish the full discrete-time transition matrix. Reference: SolCalc 2018, Aarhus University. No vendor publishes this.

timeToTriggerCdf.description: OPTIONAL extra credit. CDF as [{spinIndex, probability}] list — operators use this for player-experience modeling.

ciBands.description: OPTIONAL extra credit. Multi-seed CI bands — auditor proof that a single MC run is representative. Reference: Harrigan & Dixon CDS Press 2014.

jurisdictionGated.description: OPTIONAL — emit per-jurisdiction RTP variants if the IR supports configurable RTP (IGT-style). Field name → array of {jurisdiction, rtp}.
